title: Statement of Strategic Priorities for Online Safety
body: "The Statement of Strategic Priorities for online safety sets out the government’s strategic priorities and desired outcomes which Ofcom, the independent regulator, must have regard to when exercising its regulatory functions.  The priorities are:   Safety by design Transparency and accountability Agile regulation Inclusivity and resilience Technology and innovation   The Statement of Strategic Priorities for online safety was designated on 2 July 2025, having been laid in draft before Parliament on 8 May 2025.  This follows a consultation on the draft Statement of Strategic Priorities for online safety, held November 2024 to January 2025.  "
